ns0:entry.ns0:title: AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AvaloniaUI/Avalonia
Language: c%23
Develop Desktop, Embedded, Mobile and WebAssembly apps with C# and XAML. The future of .NET UI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HotCakeX/Harden-Windows-Security
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HotCakeX/Harden-Windows-Security
Language: c%23
Harden Windows Safely, Securely using Official Supported Microsoft methods and proper explanation | Always up-to-date and works with the latest build of Windows | Provides tools and Guides for Personal, Enterprise, Government and Military security levels | SLSA Level 3 Compliant for Secure Development and Build Process | Apps Available on MS Store✨

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JasperFx/wolverine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JasperFx/wolverine
Language: c%23
Supercharged .NET server side development!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MudBlazor/MudBlazor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MudBlazor/MudBlazor
Language: c%23
Blazor Component Library based on Material Design principles. Do more with Blazor, utilizing CSS and keeping JavaScript to a bare minimum.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QL-Win/QuickLook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QL-Win/QuickLook
Language: c%23
Bring macOS “Quick Look” feature to Windows

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuestPDF/QuestPDF
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuestPDF/QuestPDF
Language: c%23
QuestPDF is a modern library for PDF document generation. Its fluent C# API lets you design complex layouts with clean, readable code. Create documents using a flexible, component-based approach.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tyrrrz/YoutubeDownloader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tyrrrz/YoutubeDownloader
Language: c%23
Downloads videos and playlists from YouTube

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/SqlClient
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/SqlClient
Language: c%23
Microsoft.Data.SqlClient provides database connectivity to SQL Server for .NET applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/dotnet
Language: c%23
Home of .NET's Virtual Monolithic Repository which includes all the code needed to build the .NET SDK.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/eShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/eShop
Language: c%23
A reference .NET application implementing an eCommerce site

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/skills
Language: c%23
Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

ns0:entry.ns0:title: huiyadanli/RevokeMsgPatcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/huiyadanli/RevokeMsgPatcher
Language: c%23
A hex editor for WeChat/QQ/TIM - PC版微信/QQ/TIM防撤回补丁（我已经看到了，撤回也没用了）

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mgth/LittleBigMouse
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mgth/LittleBigMouse
Language: c%23
DPI Aware mouse move across screens

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/aspire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/aspire
Language: c%23
Aspire is the tool for code-first, extensible, observable dev and deploy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI
Language: c%23
Render particle effect in UnityUI(uGUI). Maskable, sortable, and no extra Camera/RenderTexture/Canvas.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/UIEffect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/UIEffect
Language: c%23
UIEffect is an open-source package that allows you to intuitively apply rich UI effects directly from the Inspector or via code. Combine various filters, such as grayscale, blur, and dissolve, to decorate your UI with a unique visual style!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: modelcontextprotocol/csharp-sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/csharp-sdk
Language: c%23
The official C# SDK for Model Context Protocol servers and clients. Maintained in collaboration with Microsoft.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nilaoda/BBDown
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nilaoda/BBDown
Language: c%23
Bilibili Downloader. 一个命令行式哔哩哔哩下载器.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nopSolutions/nopCommerce
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nopSolutions/nopCommerce
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core eCommerce software. nopCommerce is a free and open-source shopping cart.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sourcegit-scm/sourcegit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sourcegit-scm/sourcegit
